pi_items.source: export_result.sh:31 defines REPORT_PATH = '/home/ga/Documents/inactive_operators_report.txt'; task.json:5 confirms in description
export_result.sh:32 defines THRESHOLD_DAYS = 90; setup_task.sh:76-81 demonstrates 90-day boundary with test cases (89 days = active, 91 days = inactive)
setup_aerobridge.sh:150,160; task_utils.sh:9; setup_task.sh:107; consistent across all environment configuration scripts

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Aerobridge, a Django-based drone management system running on localhost:8000. The admin interface is accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/. Test data is synthetic, generated during task setup with 5 companies: one active company with recent flights (5 days ago), one at the boundary (89 days ago, just inside the 90-day threshold), one just outside the threshold (91 days ago), one very inactive (300 days ago), and one with no flights. The task requires identifying companies with no flights in the last 90 days and writing their names to /home/ga/Documents/inactive_operators_report.txt.
